INFO.value: CASE WHEN ?2 BETWEEN 1 AND 12 AND ?3 BETWEEN 1 AND CASE ?2 WHEN 2 THEN CASE WHEN MOD(?1, 4) = 0 AND (MOD(?1, 100) != 0 OR MOD(?1, 400) = 0) THEN 29 ELSE 28 END WHEN 4 THEN 30 WHEN 6 THEN 30 WHEN 9 THEN 30 WHEN 11 THEN 30 ELSE 31 END THEN TO_DATE(LPAD(?1, 4, '0') || '-' || LPAD(?2, 2, '0') || '-' || LPAD(?3, 2, '0'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') ELSE NULL END
CASE WHEN position(?2 IN substr(?1, ?3)) > 0 THEN position(?2 IN substr(?1, ?3)) + (?3-1) ELSE 0 END
CASE WHEN ?1 NOT LIKE '%[^0-9]%'THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
CASE WHEN ?1 NOT LIKE '%[^a-zA-Z]%'THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
CASE WHEN INSTR(?1,?2) > 0 THEN SUBSTR(?1,INSTR(?1,?2) + LENGTH(?2)) ELSE NULL END
CASE WHEN STRPOS(?1,?2) > 0 THEN SUBSTR(?1,STRPOS(?1,?2)+LENGTH(?2)) ELSE NULL END
CASE WHEN STRPOS(?1,?2) > 0 THEN SUBSTR(?1,STRPOS(?1,?2)+LENGTH(?2)) ELSE NULL END

CASE WHEN CHARINDEX(?2 COLLATE Latin1_General_CS_AS, ?1 COLLATE Latin1_General_CS_AS) > 0 THEN SUBSTRING(?1, CHARINDEX(?2 COLLATE Latin1_General_CS_AS, ?1 COLLATE Latin1_General_CS_AS) + LEN(?2), LEN(?1)) ELSE NULL END
CASE WHEN INSTR(?1,?2,1,?3) > 0 THEN SUBSTR(?1,INSTR(?1,?2,1,?3) + LENGTH(?2)) ELSE NULL END
CASE WHEN INSTR(?1,?2,INSTR(?1,?2)+?3-1) > 0 THEN SUBSTR(?1,INSTR(?1,?2,INSTR(?1,?2)+?3-1)+LENGTH(?2)) ELSE NULL END
CASE WHEN regexp_instr(?1,?2,1,?3) > 0 THEN substring(?1,regexp_instr(?1,?2,1,?3) + length(?2)) ELSE NULL END
CASE WHEN LOCATE(UPPER(?2),UPPER(?1)) > 0 THEN LOCATE(UPPER(?2),UPPER(?1)) ELSE NULL END
CASE WHEN LOCATE(UPPER(?2),UPPER(?1),?3) > 0 THEN LOCATE(UPPER(?2),UPPER(?1), ?3) ELSE NULL END
CASE WHEN position(lower(?2) IN lower(substr(?1,?3))) > 0 THEN position(lower(?2) IN lower(substr(?1,?3))) + (?3-1) ELSE 0 END
CASE WHEN strpos(substring(?1,?3),?2) > 0 THEN ?3 - 1 + strpos(substring(?1,?3),?2) ELSE 0 END
CASE WHEN INSTR(UPPER(?1),UPPER(?2)) > 0 THEN SUBSTR(?1,INSTR(UPPER(?1),UPPER(?2)) + LENGTH(?2)) ELSE NULL END
CASE WHEN LOCATE(?2,?1) > 0 THEN SUBSTRING(?1, LOCATE(?2, ?1) + CHAR_LENGTH(?2)) ELSE NULL END
CASE WHEN LOCATE(UPPER(?2),UPPER(?1)) > 0 THEN SUBSTR(?1,LOCATE(UPPER(?2),UPPER(?1)) + LENGTH(?2) ) ELSE NULL END
CASE WHEN position(lower(?2) IN lower(?1)) > 0 THEN substr(?1,position(lower(?2) IN lower(?1)) + length(?2)) ELSE NULL END
CASE WHEN POSITION(LOWER(?2) IN LOWER(?1)) > 0 THEN SUBSTRING(?1 FROM POSITION(LOWER(?2) IN LOWER(?1)) + LENGTH(?2)) ELSE NULL END

CASE WHEN CHARINDEX(?2 COLLATE Latin1_General_CI_AS, ?1 COLLATE Latin1_General_CI_AS) > 0 THEN SUBSTRING(?1, CHARINDEX(?2 COLLATE Latin1_General_CI_AS, ?1 COLLATE Latin1_General_CI_AS) + LEN(?2), LEN(?1)) ELSE NULL END
CASE WHEN INSTR(UPPER(?1),UPPER(?2),1,NVL(?3,1)) > 0 THEN SUBSTR(?1,INSTR(UPPER(?1),UPPER(?2),1,NVL(?3,1)) + LENGTH(?2)) ELSE NULL END
CASE WHEN REGEXP_INSTR(?1,?2,1,?3,0,'i') > 0 THEN SUBSTRING(?1,REGEXP_INSTR(?1,?2,1,?3,1,'i')) ELSE NULL END
CASE WHEN LOCATE(UPPER(?2),UPPER(?1),?3) > 0 THEN SUBSTR(?1,LOCATE(UPPER(?2),UPPER(?1),?3) + LENGTH(?2)) ELSE NULL END
CASE WHEN REGEXP_INSTR(LOWER(?1),LOWER(?2),1,?3) > 0 THEN SUBSTR(?1,REGEXP_INSTR(LOWER(?1),LOWER(?2),1,?3)+ LENGTH(?2)) ELSE NULL END
CASE WHEN regexp_instr(lower(?1), lower(?2),1,?3) > 0 THEN substring(?1 FROM regexp_instr(lower(?1), lower(?2),1,?3) + length(?2)) ELSE NULL END
((?1 - (EXTRACT(DOY FROM ?1) - 1) * INTERVAL '1' DAY) + INTERVAL '1' YEAR - INTERVAL '1' DAY)
EXTRACT(DAY FROM DATE_TRUNC('month', ?1) + INTERVAL '1 month' - INTERVAL '1 day')
(DATEDIFF(MAKEDATE(YEAR (?1), 1 ) + INTERVAL QUARTER (?1) * 3 MONTH - INTERVAL 1 DAY,MAKEDATE(YEAR (?1), 1 ) + INTERVAL (QUARTER (?1) - 1 ) * 3 MONTH) + 1)
(CAST((date_trunc('quarter', ?1) + INTERVAL '3 months' - INTERVAL '1 day' ) AS DATE ) - CAST (date_trunc('quarter', ?1) AS DATE ) + 1)
(DATE_DIFF(DATE_SUB(DATE_TRUNC(DATE_ADD(?1, INTERVAL 1 QUARTER), QUARTER), INTERVAL 1 DAY),DATE_TRUNC(?1, QUARTER),DAY) + 1)
EXTRACT(DOY FROM DATE_TRUNC( 'year', ?1) + INTERVAL '1 year' - INTERVAL '1 day' )
